object_a.label: wall feature
object_a.description: white baseboard molding along the bottom of walls
object_a.long_form_open_description: Continuous white-painted baseboard molding where walls meet the hardwood floor. Runs along left and back walls and visible in foreground; typical 3-4 inch profile.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: along the base of the walls under the arched window and beside the doors and rug

object_b.label: wall feature
object_b.long_form_open_description: White baseboard trim runs along the bottom of the walls where they meet the hardwood floor. Approximately 4 inches tall with a simple profile; visible chips/paint wear near the foreground corner.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: under the flag and framed art, continuous along the hallway walls adjacent to the floor
